name: Garden Harvest Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 28 oz can whole tomatoes, cut-up, undrained
1 16 oz can kidney beans, rinsed and drained
1 10 oz package frozen sweet corn, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Saute garlic, peppers, mushrooms, and onion until tender.
3. Add tomatoes with liquid, tomato sauce, chili powder, sugar, and cumin; bring to boiling.
4. Reduce heat to low. Add beans, zucchini, and corn.
5. Simmer, uncovered, about 10 minutes or until zucchini is tender.
6. Serve in bowls, sprinkled with cheese if desired.
Yield: 6 Servings (2-1/2 Qts)
Diabetic Exchanges: One serving (prepared with low-salt tomato sauce and no cheese) equals 2 starch, 2 vegetable, 1 fat; also, 252 calories, 675 mg sodium, 0 mg cholesterol, 44 gm carbohydrate, 10 gm protein, 7 gm fat.
